metadata.source: PDF_이현석_오픽DB전체 (result 파일 기반, DB question_type 매칭)

adv_14.english: How does internet use vary among people with different ages from old to young? Why do they use the internet? What do they do online? Please discuss this in more detail.
adv_14.description_ko: 사람들의 연령별 인터넷 이용 차이점 설명

adv_14.english: How has surfing the internet changed since you first began doing it? What is similar and what are some of the differences?
adv_14.description_ko: 인터넷 서핑과 초창기와 지금 비교

adv_14.english: Describe how people used cell phones 5 years ago. What could they do with their phone functions and applications? What are some of the biggest changes as to how people use their phones? Describe the phone you used to use in the past in detail.
adv_14.description_ko: 사람들의 휴대전화 이용 방식 5년 전과 지금 비교

adv_14.english: We can use phones to do more now than before, like finding travel directions, reading restaurant reviews, and doing other information searches. Describe how using a phone to find information has changed from the time you first started using phones until now.
adv_14.description_ko: 휴대전화를 통한 정보검색 과거와 현재 비교

adv_14.english: Can you tell me about an industry that you follow? Maybe you are interested in the food industry, energy, mobile computing, or another industry. What was this industry like 3 years ago? How has it changed since then?
adv_14.description_ko: 본인이 관심 갖고 있는 업계 최근 근황. 3년 전과 비교

adv_14.english: How do people prepare for future work in your country's industries? Do they get general education first or receive specific training once they join the company? Do they receive specific job training from a young age? How has the process changed over the past 5 years? Give me all the details.
adv_14.description_ko: 사람들이 자신 커리어를 위해 하는 노력. 5년 전과 비교

adv_14.english: Describe two different friends or family members. Describe each in as much detail as you can. Then, tell what similarities they have in common and what the differences between them are.
adv_14.description_ko: 가족/친구 2명 비교 (유사점/차이점) - 부모님

adv_14.english: Think about a country that is geographically close to your home country. In what ways has this country changed over the years? Has there been any changes in its economy, politics, etc? Describe this country and its changes in detail.
adv_14.description_ko: 우리나라와 지리적으로 근접 국가 변화 주제 설명

adv_14.english: The handling of recycling materials has changed over the years. Tell me how the collection of recycling materials used to be in the past. And how has it evolved to the present?
adv_14.description_ko: 재활용 수거 방법 과거와 현재 변화 서술 - 환경 / 인식 변화

adv_14.english: Describe what the attitude was toward recycling when you were a child. Did people recycle then? Did they throw everything out in the garbage? What were people's views on recycling at that time and how have they changed over the years?
adv_14.description_ko: 재활용에 대한 대중 인식 과거 현재 변화 서술 - 인식 변화

adv_14.english: I'd like to now talk about where you live. Many homes today are equipped with new appliances or electronic devices that make everyday life more convenient. What are some of these new home appliances or electronic devices? How have they changed household responsibilities?
adv_14.description_ko: 새로운 가전/전자제품들이 가사노동에 가져온 변화 묘사

adv_14.english: How have home appliances changed our lives? How was life before the appliances different from life now? What is the biggest change on our lives?
adv_14.description_ko: 가전제품이 우리 삶에 가져온 변화 묘사

adv_14.english: I would now like to talk about where you live. Compare how you solve problems in your home now to how your parents or friends solve problems that occur in their homes. How is it the same? How is it different?
adv_14.description_ko: 집에 생기는 문제 부모님과 본인이 해결하는 방법 차이 묘사

adv_14.english: I would like to now talk about where you live. How has the style of homes changed over the past 5 or 10 years at where you live? Are the homes being built today different from the homes built 10 years ago? What developments or changes have you noticed?
adv_14.description_ko: 5~10년 간 우리나라 주택들의 변화 주제 설명 - 가전제품

adv_14.english: You indicated in the survey that you listen to music. Pick two different kinds of music or composers. Describe each in as much detail as possible, and then compare the similarities and differences between them.
adv_14.description_ko: 다른 종류의 2가지 음악 비교

adv_14.english: You indicated in the survey that you go to movies with adults. Could you compare the movies made today to movies you saw growing up? How have movies changed? What are the differences and similarities?
adv_14.description_ko: 영화 작품들의 과거와 현재 변화 설명

adv_14.english: Have changes in audio visual technology such as cable TV, big screen TVs, computers, tablets, phones and video formats changed the way people are entertained at home? Describe the changes that you have noticed within the past 10 years. What was it like before and how is it different from now?
adv_14.description_ko: 지난 10년간 기술 변화가 영상 시청 방식 변화에 끼친 영향 설명

adv_14.english: There is a trend in the restaurant industry to offer healthier choices designed to attract the health-conscious consumer. What changes have you observed in this regard in recent years?
adv_14.description_ko: 음식점 업계의 건강식 주제로의 변화 설명

adv_14.english: The advantage of chain restaurants such as McDonald's is that the consumer knows what to expect in terms of menu, prices, etc. Are there certain advantages to small, local restaurants? How would you compare the two in terms of the overall experience each provides?
adv_14.description_ko: 음식점 체인점과 지역 음식점의 고객 경험 차이 설명

adv_14.english: What kinds of changes in restaurants or eating out have you noticed over the last few years? How was eating out different? What has brought about some of these changes?
adv_14.description_ko: 음식점 업계와 외식 문화의 변화 설명

adv_14.english: Many fast-food, take-out or delivery restaurants are now offering healthy choices. Why do you think this change has come about in recent years? Was it a result of consumer pressure, market forces or something else?
adv_14.description_ko: 테이크아웃/배달 음식점들의 건강 메뉴 추세 설명

adv_14.english: How have celebrations and gatherings in your country changed since you were a child? Are there more of these events now than before? What sorts of events are more popular today than in the past?
adv_14.description_ko: 어렸을 때 기념행사/모임과 요즘 행사들 비교

adv_14.english: Gatherings and celebrations in small towns are often different from those in big cities. Tell me about some of the similarities and differences between the celebrations people have in small towns and in big cities in your country.
adv_14.description_ko: 작은 마을과 대도시 간 모임/기념행사 비교

adv_14.english: You indicated in the survey that you stay at home for vacations. How do most people spend their vacations in your country? How does that compare to the way people spent their vacations when you were growing up? Are they doing things differently? How have things changed and why have things changed? Please take a minute to discuss this topic.
adv_14.description_ko: 사람들이 휴가를 보내는 방법 과거 현재 비교

adv_14.english: How has food shopping changed over the last 20 years? What have been some of the trends or changes you have noticed when comparing shopping today with that of the past?
adv_14.description_ko: 20년간 사람들의 식품 구매 방식 변화 – 온라인 쇼핑

adv_14.english: Different generations have different views on what is healthy. Some generations think people have to be skinny in order to be healthy, while others believe people must be muscular. What did your parents' generation think people have to be like in order to be healthy? How does that compare to what your generation believes?
adv_14.description_ko: 건강에 대한 세대간 인식 과거 현재 비교

adv_14.english: Describe how people usually stayed in good shape when you were a child. What kinds of sports did they play? Did people go to gyms? Describe what fitness was like then, and how it has changed over the years.
adv_14.description_ko: 사람들의 건강 유지 방법 과거 현재 비교

adv_14.english: You indicated in the survey that you go shopping. Going shopping has changed a great deal over the years. Talk about the most significant changes in shopping over the years.
adv_14.description_ko: 사람들의 쇼핑 습관 관련된 가장 큰 변화 묘사

adv_14.english: You indicated in the survey that you take vacations domestically. Most people say that traveling has become more difficult in the past 5 years. Tell me what types of changes you have observed when traveling and how these changes affected the traveler or travel experience.
adv_14.description_ko: 지난 5년간 여행이 더 어려워진 이유 설명 — 교통

adv_14.english: You indicated in the survey that you take vacations internationally. How has traveling to other countries changed over the years? Is it easier or more difficult? Describe what the experience was like in the past and what changes you have seen.
adv_14.description_ko: 해외여행 과거와 현재 비교 — 교통편

adv_14.english: Tell me in detail about changes you have observed concerning the relationship between your country and other countries. The change might be related to economics, sports, arts, culture or politics. Describe the changes in detail.
adv_14.description_ko: 우리나라와 다른 국가와의 관계와 관계 변화 설명 - 한일관계

adv_14.english: How have phones changed over the years? What were they like when you were younger? How were they different from the phones today? And how have these changes affected people's ability to stay connected with other people?
adv_14.description_ko: 휴대전화 과거 현재 비교. 사람들 간의 소통방법에 미친 변화

adv_14.english: Describe two different friends or family members. Describe each in as much detail as you can. Then, tell me what similarities they have in common and what the differences between them are.
adv_14.description_ko: 14번 가족/친구 2명 비교 (유사점/차이점) – 부모님

adv_15.english: What kinds of concerns do people have about internet use regarding security, privacy or safety? How have these concerns changed over time? Please discuss this in more detail.
adv_15.description_ko: 인터넷 관련 사람들의 우려 설명

adv_15.english: What kinds of problems or concerns do people have concerning the internet? Give me some background on one of these issues. Why is this problem of concern or interest to people who surf the internet?
adv_15.description_ko: 인터넷 관련 사람들의 우려나 문제점 설명

adv_15.english: In some societies, there is a concern that young people are not developing face-to-face communication skills because they spend too much time on their phones. What do people in your country think about the way in which young people use their phones?
adv_15.description_ko: 젊은이들의 휴대전화 과다사용 부작용 설명

adv_15.english: Many people use their phones to find out about current events in their countries. They can find information about everything from their favorite sports teams to what is happening in their country and around the world. Tell me about something that happened in your country or abroad. Tell me what electronic device you used, what happened from beginning to end, and why what happened was so memorable.
adv_15.description_ko: 본인이 전화기를 사용하여 검색한 국내외 이슈 설명

adv_15.english: Tell me about a time when a product did NOT meet the expectations of the public. Maybe the gaming industry produced a new video game platform that did not perform well or a new smartphone or a software program had problems when it was first released. Tell me all about what happened in detail and describe the reactions of the public and the industry to that issue.
adv_15.description_ko: 그 업계에서 기대에 못 미친 상품/서비스 묘사

adv_15.english: What is an industry or a company that people in your country are talking about nowadays? Tell me why people are interested in this industry and what they are saying about it. Give me lots of details.
adv_15.description_ko: 우리나라 사람들이 관심을 갖는 산업 분야 설명

adv_15.english: When you get together with friends and family, what are some of the topics of interests that are discussed. Why are these things of interest or concern? How do these things affect their lives? Please explain in as much detail as you can.
adv_15.description_ko: 가족/친구들을 만날 때 하는 화제 주제 설명

adv_15.english: Tell me in detail about a news item you read or heard recently about a country near your country. What was the news story about? Tell me in as much detail as you can about this report. Tell me why this story is important.
adv_15.description_ko: 이웃국가 관련 최근 읽거나 들은 뉴스 설명

adv_15.english: Stories about recycling are often in the media. Tell me about one news story that you have heard related to recycling or perhaps the environment. Describe what the story was about, what happened, and what the reaction was to the story. Describe these things in detail.
adv_15.description_ko: 재활용 혹은 환경에 대해 본 뉴스 내용 서술 - 플라스틱

adv_15.english: What are some of the stories in the news with respect to recycling or the environment today? Describe what the current news reports are saying about recycling or the environment.
adv_15.description_ko: 재활용 혹은 환경에 대해 본 뉴스 보도 서술 - 플라스틱

adv_15.english: Think about a specific modern appliance or device that people consider as useful or convenient at home. What do people say about this home appliance or device?
adv_15.description_ko: 생활에 유용한 특정 가전/전자제품 세부 묘사

adv_15.english: What are the major problems most people have when they rent a home or an apartment? How do people deal with these issues? How do these things affect how or where people live?
adv_15.description_ko: 집을 구할 때 사람들이 겪는 문제 묘사

adv_15.english: Sometimes the issues of too many new homes or not enough new homes can create a controversy in a community. Think of a time when the issue regarding housing was in the news in your area. What was the issue and why were people talking about it?
adv_15.description_ko: 우리나라 주택시장 문제 관련 뉴스 설명

adv_15.english: What new electronic gadgets or equipment are people who like music interested in these days? What are they talking about? What new products excite them and why?
adv_15.description_ko: 요즘 관심을 끄는 새로운 음악 기기/설비 묘사

adv_15.english: When your friends or family talk about movies, what topics or issues regarding movies do you discuss? Why are these issues of interest or concern to your friends? What makes them so important?
adv_15.description_ko: 친구들과 이야기하는 영화 관련 토픽 설명

adv_15.english: What are some of the new trends that you have noticed regarding TV, movie viewing, shows or technology? What are people talking about? What is it getting people excited? Why are these things of interest or importance to viewers?
adv_15.description_ko: 영상 시청 관련 새로운 트렌드, 시청자들에게 관심을 끄는 이유

adv_15.english: When your friends or family discuss restaurants they like or dislike, what are some of the characteristics they discuss the most? How do these characteristics affect their dining experiences?
adv_15.description_ko: 사람들과 음식점에 대해 언급하는 요소 설명

adv_15.english: What are the latest trends people are talking about related to take-out or delivery food options? Perhaps, it has to do with ordering online or an app, or it has to do with some kinds of new offerings. Discuss the changes that you have observed recently regarding take-out or delivery food options.
adv_15.description_ko: 테이크아웃/배달 음식의 트렌드 변화 설명

adv_15.english: When the celebrations and gatherings may be important to people in a city or town, it takes a lot of work, organization and money to put on a successful event. Have there been discussions about the difficulties of having these sorts of events in your area? Tell me about one such event and things people discussed regarding the difficulties of organizing it.
adv_15.description_ko: 기념행사/모임 관련해서 사람들이 논의했던 이슈 설명

adv_15.english: What kinds of concerns do you hear people express when they have gatherings and celebrations in your area? Do people complain about traffic, parking, noise, garbage or other problems? What do people in your area say about such celebrations?
adv_15.description_ko: 모임/기념행사 관련 사람들이 갖고 있는 우려 설명

adv_15.english: Experts state that vacations are important for every individual. Take a minute and report for me the important benefits of vacation time to a person's health, relationships and personal growth.
adv_15.description_ko: 휴가가 중요하다고 생각하는 이유 설명

adv_15.english: There have been many stories in the news of foods that have been contaminated or that contained dangerous bacteria. Tell me about the food scare stories you heard about or read about.
adv_15.description_ko: 식품 오염 사건 관련 뉴스 보도 설명 – 집단 식중독

adv_15.english: There are often health related news stories. Tell me about a recent news story related to health issues. Describe what happened in detail and what the reaction of your community was to the story.
adv_15.description_ko: 건강 관련 최근 본 뉴스 보도 내용 설명

adv_15.english: Describe a recent event in your area that involved health issues. Perhaps, something happened in the food or medical industries. Perhaps, something related to sports happened or a ban on smoking was enacted. Describe what happened in detail including the reaction of your community.
adv_15.description_ko: 건강 관련 최근 발생한 사건 설명

adv_15.english: What kinds of products and services do you hear shoppers are talking about the most these days? Why do you think they are generating so much interest? Tell me in detail about those products. What are people saying about them and why?
adv_15.description_ko: 사람들이 요즘 많이 언급하는 인기 상품/서비스 묘사

adv_15.english: When people talk about traveling, what are the main issues or concerns they typically raise or discuss? What has caused these concerns? What is being done to address these concerns for the future?
adv_15.description_ko: 여행 관련 사람들이 갖고 있는 걱정 설명 — 안전

adv_15.english: When people discuss traveling to other countries, what are the things that they are most interested in doing or seeing? Why are these things of such interest or importance to travelers?
adv_15.description_ko: 해외로 나가는 여행객들이 관심 갖는 것들 묘사 — 관광/먹방/쇼핑

adv_15.english: I'd like for you to think about a specific historic event that has affected the relationship between your country and one of its neighboring nations. It could be a treaty signed between two countries, a cultural event or the visit of another country's minister or president. Tell me in detail about everything that happened.
adv_15.description_ko: 우리나라와 이웃 국가와의 역사적 사건과 여파 설명 - 남북관계

adv_15.english: What kinds of concerns or problems come up when people discuss the use of cell phones? Give me some background on this problem. Why are these issues of interest or concern to people?
adv_15.description_ko: 사람들이 언급하는 휴대전화 사용 관련 문제점/우려

adv_15.english: What are some holidays in your country? What do people do during these holidays? What is special about them?
adv_15.description_ko: 우리나라 휴일 종류, 사람들이 하는 일들 묘사 — 명절/전통풍습

adv_15.english: What are some issues or concerns people have regarding holidays? What do people do to address those issues or concerns.
adv_15.description_ko: 휴일 관련 사람들의 우려/걱정 설명

comparison.english: The internet has definitely changed over time. Describe for me some of your early memories of surfing the internet. How was internet surfing different in the past?
comparison.description_ko: 본인의 초창기 인터넷 서핑 경험 묘사

comparison.english: Describe the first phone you remember you were using. What did it look like? What feature did it have? How was it different from the phone you are using now? Describe your first phone in as much detail as possible.
comparison.description_ko: 본인이 썼던 첫 전화기와 지금 전화기 비교

comparison.english: Technology has definitely changed over time. Tell me about an early memory that you have about a piece of technology. It could be a computer or a mobile phone from many years ago. Describe for me what this thing was like back then. How has that technology changed over time?
Do you have more or less free time now than you did in the past? Describe for me how your free time has changed over time.
How has your country changed in the past decade? Choose one area of change and provide a lot of details about urban development, tourism, or any other area.
comparison.description_ko: 우리나라가 지난 10년간 겪은 변화 중 하나 설명

comparison.english: Tell me about the furniture that you had in your childhood home. Was there anything different from the furniture that you have today? Describe for me what your home looked like at that time.
comparison.description_ko: 어렸을 때 가구 지금 가구 비교 - 크기/색상

comparison.english: Describe the home you lived in as a child. How was that home different from the home you live in now?
comparison.description_ko: 어렸을 때 살았던 집과 지금 집 비교 - 동네 묘사

comparison.english: Tell me about a house or apartment where you grew up. What did your home and the surrounding area look like when you were young? How has it changed?
comparison.description_ko: 어렸을 때 살았던 집과 동네 묘사

comparison.english: When did you first become interested in music? What kinds of music did you like first? Tell me how your interest in music developed from your childhood until today.
comparison.description_ko: 본인이 음악을 처음 좋아하게 된 계기, 취향 변화

comparison.english: Tell me how you first became interested in watching TV or movies, and how that interest has changed or developed from when you first became interested until today.
comparison.description_ko: 본인이 TV 또는 영화에 처음 관심을 갖게 된 계기, 취향 변화

comparison.english: TV shows have definitely changed over time. Describe for me the TV shows that you remember from your childhood. What was the show like? How was it different from the TV shows that are popular today?
comparison.description_ko: TV 방송 프로그램 과거와 현재 비교

comparison.english: Describe for me a restaurant that you remember from your childhood. What was the restaurant like? Was it different from the restaurants you visit today?
comparison.description_ko: 어렸을 때 갔던 음식점 묘사 – 햄버거집

comparison.english: Ideas about what good health is and how to maintain it change frequently. What did people do to maintain good health when you were a child? What was considered to be a healthy diet at that time? How did people usually exercise? Describe how our ideas of what is healthy have changed over time.
comparison.description_ko: 건강에 대한 인식과 운동법 과거 현재 비교

comparison.english: How have the eating habits of healthy people changed since you were a child? Was the healthy diet same as it is now? Describe in detail the major differences.
comparison.description_ko: 건강한 사람들의 식습관의 과거 현재 변화

comparison.english: How has the weather in your country changed over time? What was the weather typically like when you were a child? How was the weather different from the weather today?

comparison.english: How did you travel when you were a child? Were the types of transportation different back then? Describe for me how people used to GET AROUND in your city or town.

description.english: What kind of technology do people typically use in your country? Do people use computers, cell phones, or hand-held devices? What are some common forms of technology that people have?

description.english: Tell me about one industry in your country that is well-known. You can talk about any industry such as the entertainment, technology, automotive or another industry. Pick one industry and tell me all about it.

description.english: Tell me about some of the popular holidays in your country. Where do people typically celebrate these holidays? What kinds of things do they use to celebrate?

description.description_ko: 우리나라 보편적인 음식점 묘사 – 고깃집

description.english: Tell me about the weather in your country. Are there different seasons? What is the weather typically like?

description.description_ko: 우리나라의 보편적인 호텔들 묘사

description.description_ko: 본인이 평소에 하는 예약 종류/장소를 묘사

You might include information about where and when you used to shop, the people you went shopping with, what kinds of things you used to do while shopping or anything else that would give a clear picture of that experience.

past_childhood.english: Think about your early memories of shopping. Is there a store or a market that you remember from your childhood? Describe this place for me. What did it look like? What were your impressions of the place?

past_childhood.english: Think about your early memories of shopping. Is there a store or a market that you remember from your childhood? Describe this place for me. What did it look like? What was your impression of the place?
past_childhood.description_ko: 어렸을 때 기억에 남는 상점/시장 묘사 — 장 보러 간 경험

past_childhood.english: Tell me about some of the trips you took in your youth. Where did you go? Who did you go with? And what did you see or do during those early trips?

past_childhood.english: Tell me about an appointment you remember from your childhood. Maybe you visited a doctor, the dentist, or a new school. Tell me about the place you went to for this appointment. What was your impression? How did you feel?
