Begin with some background information about when and where this happened, and who you were with, and then tell me all the details of the incident and what you did to resolve it.
past_special.description_ko: 표를 예매하거나 예약을 하고 뭔가 문제가 생겼던 경험

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Have you ever tried to watch a boring movie? If so, what did you do? Did you watch the whole movie? Tell me all the details of this experience.
past_special.description_ko: 본인이 지루한 영화를 본 경험 설명

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Have you ever gone to a movie or wanted to watch a special TV event, and then something happened that prevented you from watching it? Tell me about that experience, when it happened, where you were, and who you were with. Tell me all the details, especially what happened that prevented you from watching the movie or the TV event and how you dealt with the situation.
past_special.description_ko: 본인이 과거 영화/TV를 보려고 했는데 차질을 빚은 경험 묘사

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Have you ever bought furniture that wasn't what you had expected? Maybe you got the wrong color or maybe it didn't fit in the space you had for it. Tell me about a time when you had a problem with a new piece of furniture.
past_special.description_ko: 구매한 가구에 문제가 있었던 본인 경험 설명

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Has anything like that ever happened to you? Have you ever bought something for your home or yourself that did not work out? Tell me everything that happened and how you eventually solved the problem.
past_special.description_ko: 집에 구매한 무엇인가 마음에 안 들었던 본인 경험 설명

past_special.english: Do you remember the first time you heard about recycling? Tell me how it happened, how old you were, where you were and who told you about the process. Describe in detail what happened from beginning to end.
past_special.description_ko: 본인의 처음으로 재활용을 접해본 경험 묘사

past_special.english: Describe a specific time in which you had trouble with recycling. It may have been a situation in which you moved to a new place and did not know the rules, or you put the materials in the wrong containers. Describe what happened from beginning to end.
past_special.description_ko: 본인이 재활용 중 있었던 문제 설명

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Have you ever been in a situation where you agreed to do something for friends or family members and then couldn't do it? Give me all the details about what you agreed to do, what happened, and how the situation was resolved.
past_special.description_ko: 가족/친구를 위해 무엇을 해주기로 했다가 못 지켰던 경험 묘사

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Have you ever been surprised to discover something broken at home? Tell me the story of what you found, how it was broken and what you did to solve the problem.
past_special.description_ko: 무엇인가 깨져 있는 물건을 발견해본 본인 경험. 대처방법

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Tell me about a situation you've had with some sort of equipment which broke or did not work properly. Give me the background of the situation and then tell me what happened, and how you resolved the problem.
past_special.description_ko: 본인의 기기가 고장 나서 해결한 방법 설명

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Have you ever had plans or tickets, then found out that you could not attend the performance? When was this? What happened? Tell me everything about the situation and what you did to try to resolve it.
past_special.description_ko: 공연표를 예매했다가 공연에 가지 못한 본인 경험 설명

past_special.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You have received the rental car, but there are many problems with it. Call the rental agency and explain the situation. Give two to three alternatives.
past_special.description_ko: 렌터카에 문제가 있음. 렌터카 회사에 전화로 해결

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Have you ever rented a car? Tell me about when you had to rent a car. When and where was it? Why did you need to rent a car? Where did you go? Tell me everything about that experience.
past_special.description_ko: 본인의 렌터카 이용 경험 묘사

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Can you now tell me the story of an experience that you had while you were on one of your vacations that was memorable because something unexpected happened or because it was so enjoyable? Start this story by telling me when this happened, where you were, and who you were traveling with. And then tell me all the details of the story.
past_special.description_ko: 본인 휴가 중에 있었던 기억에 남는 에피소드 설명 – 제한/치한 경험

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Now, tell me about a time when you had a problem while using a bike or any other type of transportation. What happened and how did you deal with the problem?
past_special.description_ko: 자전거나 다른 교통수단 관련 겪은 어려움 묘사 — 교통정체

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Have you ever traveled somewhere and missed a bus, a train or a plane? Tell me about an experience you have had when you had difficulty getting to your destination as planned. Start by telling me where you were going and why. Then, tell me everything that happened and what you had to do to finally get to your destination.
past_special.description_ko: 본인이 여행 중 교통편을 놓쳐서 생긴 문제 설명

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Tell me about a memorable experience you had while staying at a hotel. Maybe there was a problem with your room. Maybe you met some other guests. Tell me the whole story of an interesting hotel visit.
past_special.description_ko: 호텔에서 기억에 남는 본인 에피소드 묘사 — 체험/위험 경험

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Have you ever had a problem regarding traveling outside of your country for work or pleasure? Explain all the details about the situation.
past_special.description_ko: 해외출장/여행 중에 본인이 겪어본 문제 설명

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Think about a time when your travel plans did not work out as expected. What happened? Tell me all about the circumstances, what you and the others did, and how the situation was finally resolved.
past_special.description_ko: 본인의 여행 계획이 뜻대로 되지 않은 경험 묘사

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Was there ever a time when the weather was really not what you had expected? Maybe it snowed in the spring, maybe it was especially warm in the winter, or maybe the rainy season was dry or the dry season was rainy. Tell me in detail about a time when the weather was not what people had expected.
past_special.description_ko: 예상치 못한 날씨를 경험한 본인 경험 묘사 — 여름

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Has anything like that ever happened to you? Have you ever forgotten something somewhere or could not find something important? Tell me in detail about an experience you had when you've lost or forgotten something important.
past_special.description_ko: 본인이 무엇인가를 분실하거나 잊어버린 경험 묘사

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Have you ever had any problems with your bank card when you were using an ATM? Perhaps, your card stuck in the machine. Or you found someone else's money or card. Describe the problem you had in detail.
past_special.description_ko: 본인이 카드로 ATM 사용 중 문제가 생겼던 경험

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Can you remember an experience you had with a bank account, a credit card, or an ATM card that required some assistance? Perhaps, you lost your card or a card would not work. Tell me about that experience you had in as much detail as you can.
past_special.description_ko: 은행 계좌나 신용카드 사용 중 겪은 본인 문제 설명

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Have you ever had an important appointment that you had to miss for some reason or perhaps you were late? Tell me in detail about an experience you had when you had trouble getting into an important appointment.
past_special.description_ko: 중요한 예약 불참 혹은 늦은 본인 경험 묘사

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Have you ever had to miss a class, a meeting or an interview at school or at work? Tell me the story of that experience. What happened? When did it happen and how did you resolve it? Give me lots of details.
past_special.description_ko: 수업, 미팅, 면접 못 가게 된 본인 경험 묘사

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Have you ever made plans for trip or a party but had to cancel at the last minute because of something that happened unexpectedly? Tell me everything about what had happened that prevented you from going.
past_special.description_ko: 막판에 파티나 여행 취소한 본인 경험 묘사

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Tell me about a time when you really wanted to go to a party or a celebration, but for some reason you could not go. What happened? Tell me the whole story from beginning to end.
past_special.description_ko: 파티나 행사에 불참하게 된 본인 경험 묘사

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Can you tell me about a memorable visit you made to your family or friends? Pick one of those special visits and tell me all about it. Start with some background about where and when it took place. And then, tell me the whole story of what happened during the visit.
past_special.description_ko: 친구나 가족을 방문해 본 기억에 남는 본인 경험 묘사 — 취한경험

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Have you ever had a holiday plan that did not go as you expected? Maybe you had trouble when you traveled. Maybe there was unusual weather that complicated your holiday plan. Tell me about the holiday that did not go the way you planned. Tell me everything that happen and what you did to deal with the situation.
past_special.description_ko: 휴일에 참아 놓은 계획에 차질을 빚은 본인 경험 설명 — 교통정체

past_special.english: Has anything interesting or unusual ever happened in the area which you live? Tell me in detail about the memorable event that has happened in your area. Be sure to tell me what happened from beginning to end.
past_special.description_ko: 본인 동네에 발생했던 기억에 남는 사건 묘사

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Was there a time when you had some free time and had some plans? But maybe the weather got bad. Or maybe you had work or chores that had to be taken care of. How did you deal with the situation that did not turn out as you had expected?
past_special.description_ko: 자유시간에 뭔가 계획했던 것이 뜻대로 되지 않은 경험

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Have you ever had a time when you were supposed to visit family or friends, but you were not able to go? Maybe something came up at work, school or home. Maybe you had some kind of problem with transportation. Tell me about a visit that you had to cancel for some reason. Tell me everything that happened.
past_special.description_ko: 가족/친구 집을 방문하려 했던 계획을 취소해야 했던 경험

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Describe a specific time when you did something to improve your health. It could be the first day that you began a diet, a training program at the gym or a new sport. Describe what happened in detail from beginning to end.
past_special.description_ko: 본인 건강 개선을 위해 본인이 해본 일 묘사

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Tell me in detail about a particular challenge you faced related to your health. Tell me everything you did to face that challenge. Maybe you tried a difficult diet or maybe you tried to stop smoking. Tell me everything that you did.
past_special.description_ko: 본인의 건강 증진을 위해 했던 도전 과제 설명

past_special.english: We sometimes have interesting experiences when we have meals with family, friends or co-workers. Tell me about a memorable meal you had. Who were you with and where did you have the meal? What kind of food did you have?
past_special.description_ko: 기억에 남는 본인의 식사 자리 경험 묘사

past_special.english: Describe a time when you made a significant change to your diet or exercise routine. What led to this change? How did it work out? Describe in detail from beginning to end.
past_special.description_ko: 본인의 과거 식습관이나 운동에 큰 변화를 준 경험 설명

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Tell me about a time when you went out for a special meal with your family, friends or co-workers. What was the occasion? Where did you go and what happened during the meal? Tell me what happened from beginning to end.
past_special.description_ko: 최근 음식점에서 했던 특별했던 식사자리 묘사

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Have you ever had anything memorable happen to you when you were going to a restaurant? Maybe someone was late or got lost or something interesting happened during the meal. Explain your experience in detail. What was the situation and what happened from start to finish?
past_special.description_ko: 음식점 관련해서 예기치 않았던 본인 에피소드 묘사

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Tell me about a memorable experience you had at a restaurant. Maybe you did not like the food you ordered. Maybe there was some issue with other customers. Tell me everything about the incident you encountered.
past_special.description_ko: 음식점에서 있었던 예기치 않았던 본인 에피소드 묘사

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Has anything like that ever happened to you? Have you ever forgotten something somewhere or could not find something important? Tell me in detail about the experience you've had when you've lost or forgotten something important.
past_special.description_ko: 본인이 물건을 분실했거나, 무엇인가 까먹었던 경험 묘사

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Have you ever bought a piece of technology which was not what you had wanted or different from what you had expected? What was the problem and how did you solve the situation? Tell me in detail about the beginning of the story until the end.
past_special.description_ko: 새로운 제품/기술이 마음에 들지 않았던 경험 묘사

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Have you ever had to set up a new phone? Tell me about a specific time when you had to do that. What happened during the process? Perhaps, you had to download information or contact numbers from the old phone. Perhaps, you had to download applications or music. Tell me exactly what happened when you had to set up the new phone.
past_special.description_ko: 새로 개통한 전화기를 세팅해본 경험 설명

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. People sometimes have difficulties with their phones when they are travelling, commuting, or going from one place to another. Sometimes, their batteries run out. Sometimes, they cannot get a good signal when they make a phone call. Tell me about a time when you had difficulties using your phone while travelling or commuting.
past_special.description_ko: 여행이나 출퇴근 중 본인 전화기 사용 중 겪었던 문제점 설명 — 배터리

past_special.english: That's the end of the situation. Have you ever had an issue or a problem with your cell phone? Tell me about one of those experiences and what the situation was. How did you get it resolved? Tell me all the details about what happened and what made this situation unforgettable.
past_special.description_ko: 본인 전화기 사용 중 겪었던 문제점 설명 — 배터리

routine.english: Tell me about what you do when you surf the internet. What kinds of sites do you usually visit? Do you usually share videos, do your shopping, read the news, etc? What kinds of information are you usually looking for?
routine.description_ko: 본인이 인터넷상에서 하는 일들 묘사

routine.english: Tell me about your typical routine when you get online at work. What about in your free time? Tell me about your online activities.
routine.description_ko: 본인이 반복적으로 인터넷상에서 하는 일들 묘사

routine.english: What kinds of things do you and you friends usually do on your phones besides talking to each other over the phone? Do you update social media pages? Do you play games? What do you usually do with your phone?
routine.description_ko: 전화통화 외에 전화기로 주로 무엇을 하는지 묘사

routine.english: What do people usually do to prepare for their future careers? How do they learn about the different types of industries and how do they get ready to apply for those jobs?
routine.description_ko: 사람들이 자신 커리어를 위해 하는 노력들 묘사

routine.english: Tell me about how you use your furniture on a typical day. What kinds of things do you do with your furniture?
routine.description_ko: 평소에 가구들을 어떤 용도로 사용하는지 설명 - 소파/옷장

routine.english: How do you go about recycling? What do you do first, second, and next until you complete the process? Tell me everything.
routine.description_ko: 본인이 집에서 재활용하는 방법 묘사 - 분리수거

routine.english: What is your normal routine at home? What do you usually do during the weekdays? What kinds of things do you do on the weekend?
routine.description_ko: 본인의 집에서 주중/주말 일과 묘사 - 집안일 / 재활용

routine.english: Tell me what you do to keep your home clean and comfortable. What kinds of housework do you do around your home?
routine.description_ko: 본인이 집에서 하는 집안 일 묘사 - 집안일 / 재활용

routine.english: When and where do you usually go to listen to music? Do you listen to radio? Do you go to concerts? Tell me about the different ways you enjoy music.
routine.description_ko: 본인이 음악을 듣는 장소, 시간 묘사

routine.english: Tell me what you usually do when you go to see movies. Who do you like to go with? What do you do before and after the movie?
routine.description_ko: 본인이 영화를 누구와 보러 가고, 전후로 하는 일들 묘사

routine.english: Tell me what you usually do when you watch TV shows or movies. When do you watch it? Who do you watch it with? Where do you watch it? Tell me about your typical routine when you what TV shows or movies.
routine.description_ko: 본인의 TV 방송 혹은 영화 시청 습관 묘사

routine.english: Tell me about what you usually do when you eat at a restaurant. What do you do first, second, etc? Take me through a typical restaurant visit.
routine.description_ko: 음식점에 가면 어떻게 하는지 순서대로 묘사

routine.english: Tell me about your favorite take-out or delivery routine. Do you order at a counter, by phone, or on the internet? Do you pick up or prefer delivery? What kind of things do you usually order this way?
routine.description_ko: 본인이 선호하는 음식 테이크아웃/배달 방법 – 음식 배달앱

routine.english: How do busy working people usually get their meals during the workweek? Do they order food from restaurants, go out to eat, or something else? What do they usually do?
routine.description_ko: 직장인들이 평일 식사를 주로 어떻게 해결하는지 묘사

routine.english: What do you usually do for dinner during the week? Do you order food or go out to eat? Do you make your own meals or does someone else make them for you? Do you eat alone or with other people? What do you usually do for dinner during the weekweek?
routine.description_ko: 본인이 주로 평일 저녁식사를 어떻게 하는지 묘사

routine.english: How do you shop for healthy food? What kinds of things do you have to do to cook healthy food?
routine.description_ko: 건강식 구매 방법 및 조리법 설명 – 식료품점

routine.english: Tell me about the kinds of foods you eat on a regular day. When and where do you usually eat?
routine.description_ko: 본인이 먹는 일상음식 묘사 – 건강식

routine.english: Tell me about all the things you do in order to stay healthy.
routine.description_ko: 본인이 건강을 위해 평상시 하는 일들 묘사

routine.english: What are the eating habits of healthy people? What do they usually eat during the week, for breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks, etc?
routine.description_ko: 건강한 사람들의 식습관 묘사

routine.english: Describe a typical shopping day for you. Tell me everything you do from the moment you leave home until you return.
routine.description_ko: 본인이 쇼핑을 하러 가는 날 하는 일들 순서대로 묘사

routine.english: Can you tell me all the things you do in order to prepare to take trips?
routine.description_ko: 본인이 여행 가기 전에 하는 준비 설명 — 예약+짐싸기

routine.english: Tell me about what tourists usually do when they visit another country. Where do they go? What do they do there?
routine.description_ko: 우리나라 관광객들이 해외여행지에서 하는 일들 묘사 — 관광/먹방/쇼핑

routine.english: I'd like to know about your routine of talking on the phone. Who do you talk with, when do you usually talk on the phone and how long do you talk for? Do you do other things at the same time when you are on the phone?
routine.description_ko: 본인의 전화통화 습관 묘사 (상대, 시점, 통화길이, 함께 하는 일)

routine.english: What do you usually do when you go shopping for new clothes? Where do you go and what do you look for? Tell me about a typical shopping trip for you.
routine.description_ko: 본인이 평소 옷을 사러 갈 때 하는 일들 묘사 – 쇼핑 순서

routine.english: Tell me about the kinds of transportation you use on a typical day. Where do you usually go and how do you get there?
routine.description_ko: 본인이 자주 이용하는 교통 수단 묘사 – 버스/지하철/택시/운전

routine.english: Tell me what you typically do when you go to a hotel. What do you do first, second, et cetera? When do you usually stay at hotels?
routine.description_ko: 호텔에 언제 투숙하는지, 도착해서 하는 일들 설명

routine.english: Tell me about the kinds of things you usually do when you go to the bank.
routine.description_ko: 본인이 은행에 가서 하는 업무 묘사

routine.english: What kinds of things do you usually do when you have an appointment? Tell me what a typical appointment is like for you.
routine.description_ko: 본인이 평소에 예약을 할 때 하는 일들 구체적으로 묘사

routine.english: Tell me about the kinds of things you typically do when you visit friends or family? Do you eat? Talk? Or play together? What are some popular activities when you get together?
routine.description_ko: 가족/친구 집에 가면 주로 하는 일들 묘사 – 수다 (날씨/영화)

routine.english: Choose one of the holidays you just told me about. Tell me about all the things people typically do to celebrate this holiday. What activities are involved?
routine.description_ko: 위에 언급한 휴일에 사람들이 하는 일들 상세 묘사 — 전통풍습

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. Your friend has found a cool website. Call your friend and ask three or four questions about this new website.
rp_11.description_ko: 친구가 찾은 웹사이트에 대해 친구에게 전화로 질문

rp_11.english: You have been writing a report about the technology industry. Your friend knows a lot about this industry. Call her and ask three or four questions to learn more about this industry for your report.
rp_11.description_ko: 기술산업 관련 보고서를 쓰기 위해 많이 아는 친구에게 전화 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You are at a clothing store and need to get some clothes. Ask two to three questions about the clothes you would like to buy.
rp_11.description_ko: 옷가게에 가서 현장 직원에게 옷 구매에 대해 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You need to buy some clothes. Go to a clothing store and tell the salesperson about the piece of clothing you want to buy. Ask two to three questions about all the things you need to know about that type of clothes.
rp_11.description_ko: 옷가게에 가서 현장 직원에게 구매하고 싶은 옷에 대한 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You see a sign at your favorite store that says that they are having a big sale. Go to the store and ask three or four questions to get as much information as possible about the sale.
rp_11.description_ko: 좋아하는 상점에 직접 가서 큰 세일 관련 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You see a sign at your favorite store that says that they are having a big sale. Call the store and ask three or four questions about that special sale.
rp_11.description_ko: 좋아하는 상점에 전화해서 큰 세일 관련 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. There is a newly opened store. Call your friend who knows about the new store and ask some questions about the store to get some information.
rp_11.description_ko: 새로 오픈한 상점에 대해 친구에게 전화로 질문

rp_11.english: Your friend has told you about a great food store. Call your friend and ask two or three questions about the food store he talked about.
rp_11.description_ko: 친구가 말한 식료품점에 대해 친구에게 전화로 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You want to take a trip within your own country. Call the travel agent and ask three or four questions to find out what you need.
rp_11.description_ko: 여행사 직원에게 전화해서 여행 상품 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You are planning a vacation with a friend. Call the travel agency and describe the kind of vacation you and your friend are planning. Then, ask three or four questions to find out what you need to know to complete the plans for this vacation.
rp_11.description_ko: 여행사에 전화해서 친구와의 함께 갈 휴가 상품 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You need to make a travel arrangement for a trip you want to take next month. Call the travel agency and ask three or four questions to get the information that you need to plan your trip.
rp_11.description_ko: 다음 달에 갈 여행에 대해 여행사에 전화로 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You are planning to visit a friend who is living in a different country. Ask your friend three or four questions about the geography of his or her country.
rp_11.description_ko: 해외 친구 방문 계획 중. 전화로 현지 지형에 대해 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. Your friend has just returned from a vacation to the United States. Ask your friend three or four questions to find out everything you can about his or her trip.
rp_11.description_ko: 미국으로 휴가 다녀온 친구에게 전화로 질문

rp_11.english: I want to visit your country. You want to help me, but you need more information. Ask me three or four questions to learn more about me and my trip.
rp_11.description_ko: 우리나라 방문 계획하고 있는 상대에게 몇 가지 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You have arrived at the airport, but your flight has been delayed for 2 hours. Go to the counter and ask the person there three or four questions about the delay.
rp_11.description_ko: 공항에 도착했는데 항공편이 2시간 출발 지연. 카운터에 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You want to take a friend to see a movie. Call the movie theater and ask three or four questions to get the information you need to buy the movie tickets.
rp_11.description_ko: 영화관에 친구와 함께 볼 영화표 구매 전화 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. Your friend just told you about a great new movie. Ask your friend three or four questions about the movie to see if you want to watch it too.
rp_11.description_ko: 친구가 언급한 영화를 본인도 보고 싶은 지 알아보기 위해 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You are having a group of friends over to watch a movie. Ask your friends four to five questions about the kind of movie you should watch together.
rp_11.description_ko: 친구를 집으로 초대함. 집에서 어떤 영화 보고 싶은 지 전화 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You want to buy a new piece of furniture for your home. Speak to the store clerk and describe what you want. Ask three or four questions about the furniture they have for sale.
rp_11.description_ko: 가구점 직원에게 사고 싶은 가구에 대해 현장 문의

rp_11.english: Suppose you have moved into a new building and you want to know how recycling works. Ask the building manager three or four questions about the recycling policies.
rp_11.description_ko: 새로 입주한 건물에 재활용 방법 관리실에 전화문의

rp_11.english: Suppose you just moved to a big apartment building. Call the person at the front desk and ask three to four questions about the building's recycling policy.
rp_11.description_ko: 새로 입주한 아파트에 재활용 방법 관리실에 전화문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. Someone in your family is going on a vacation and you have agreed to take care of his or her responsibilities at home. Call your relative and ask three or four questions to get all the information you need.
rp_11.description_ko: 휴가 가는 친척의 집을 봐주기 해서 전화로 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You are looking for a new home. Call a real estate agent, introduce yourself, and then ask three or four questions about homes and services they offer.
rp_11.description_ko: 부동산에 구하고 싶은 집에 대한 전화 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You want to buy an MP3 Player. You have a friend who knows a lot about MP3 players. Call your friend and ask three or four questions to get information about buying an MP3 Player.
rp_11.description_ko: 친구가 쓰는 MP3 플레이어에 대해 전화로 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You want to get two tickets to see a performance during your vacation. Call the box office and ask three or four questions to get the tickets.
rp_11.description_ko: 공연장에 공연 티켓 구매 전화 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You need to rent a car for about a week. Call the rental agency and ask three or four questions to get all the information you need.
rp_11.description_ko: 렌터카 업체에 전화해서 차 렌트 전화 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You are visiting New York on vacation. You go to a car rental agency to rent a car. Imagine you are speaking to a rental car agent and ask three or four questions about renting a car for a week.
rp_11.description_ko: 뉴욕 휴가 가서 렌터카 업체에서 현장 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You are driving your car through a small town and have car trouble. Go to the nearest service station and ask for help. Ask three or four questions in order to get the information you need to get your car fixed.
rp_11.description_ko: 작은 동네 지나가다 차 고장. 서비스 센터에 가서 차량 수리 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You want to borrow a bike from your friend to go to a shopping mall and buy something. Call your friend and ask three or four questions as to whether you can borrow the bike.
rp_11.description_ko: 쇼핑몰에 가기 위해 친구 자전거 빌리기 위해 전화 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You need to buy a train ticket to go visit your friend this weekend. Go to the ticket counter at the train station and ask three or four questions to get information you need to make a reservation.
rp_11.description_ko: 기차역 창구에 가서 기차표 구매 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You are visiting a new city and need a hotel room for the night. Call a hotel and ask three or four questions to find out about its rooms and services.
rp_11.description_ko: 새로운 도시 방문. 당일 저녁 호텔 투숙 전화 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You are planning a business trip outside of your country. Call the hotel you will stay at and ask three or four questions to learn more about the hotel and the country.
rp_11.description_ko: 해외출장 중에 머무를 호텔에 전화해서 호텔에 대해 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You have arrived in a new city and you're trying to find a hotel for tonight. Go to the reception desk of a hotel. Describe the room you want and ask three or four questions to get information about what is available.
rp_11.description_ko: 새로운 도시에 도착. 호텔 프론트에 가서 투숙 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You are planning a vacation abroad. Call your hotel and ask three or four questions about the weather in that country and what kind of clothes you should bring with you.
rp_11.description_ko: (챙겨갈 옷을 위해) 호텔에 전화해서 현지 날씨 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You are staying in a hotel and have a free day to explore the city. Go to the hotel front desk and ask three or four questions to find out all you can about what to do in the area.
rp_11.description_ko: 호텔 프론트에 가서 자유시간에 할 수 있는 활동 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You want to open a new bank account. Call the bank and ask three or four questions about the services they offer to open an account.
rp_11.description_ko: 은행에 전화해서 계좌 개설 관련 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You need to open a new bank account. Go to the bank and ask the bank representative three or four questions to learn everything about what you need to do to open an account.
rp_11.description_ko: 은행 지점 현장에 가서 직원에게 은행 계좌 개설 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You need to make an appointment with your doctor. Call the office and describe what you need. Then, ask three or four questions to find out when the doctor is available.
rp_11.description_ko: 병원 진료 예약 전화 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. Imagine that you have an interview for a job at a very important company. To prepare for the interview, you want to learn more about the company. Call the company and ask three or four questions to learn more about it.
rp_11.description_ko: 면접 보러 가야 하는 회사에 대해 전화로 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You have been invited to a holiday party. Call your friend and ask when the party starts and what you should bring there. Ask two or three more questions about the party.
rp_11.description_ko: 친구에게 휴일파티에 대해 전화 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. Your friend is thinking about having a holiday party and has asked for your help to plan the event. Call your friend and ask three or four questions to find out more about the party.
rp_11.description_ko: 친구 휴일파티 준비 도와 주기 위해 전화로 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. Your friend asked you to help prepare for a birthday party. Call your friend and ask three to four questions to find out more about the party.
rp_11.description_ko: 친구 생일파티 준비를 도와 주기 위해 전화로 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. An old friend called to ask you to come to a party. Call your friend and ask three to four questions to find out everything you need to know.
rp_11.description_ko: 친구가 초대한 파티에 대해 전화 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. Your friend has invited you to a holiday meal. Call your friend and ask three or four questions to find out when you should come, what you should bring and any other information about the event.
rp_11.description_ko: 친구 집 휴일 식사에 초대 받음. 식사에 대해 전화 질문

rp_11.english: A friend of yours invites you to attend a celebration in the area which she lives. Ask your friend three or four questions to learn more about this celebration.
rp_11.description_ko: 친구에게 기념 모임 자리에 대해 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You want to get together with your friend. Call your friend and ask two to three questions about where and when to meet.
rp_11.description_ko: 친구 만나기로 한 약속 언제 어디서 만날 지 전화로 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. Your friend wants to invite you for a visit this weekend. Call your friend and ask three or four questions about the plans.
rp_11.description_ko: 친구 집으로 이번 주말에 초대받음. 계획에 대해 전화로 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You hear about a new gym in your area and you want to find out what services they offer. Call the gym and ask three or four questions to learn more about it.
rp_11.description_ko: 최근 새로 오픈한 동네 헬스클럽 전화 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You want to join a new gym. Call the gym and ask three or four questions to find out more about what they have to offer.
rp_11.description_ko: 새로운 헬스클럽에 시설 관련 전화 문의

rp_11.english: There is a new health food store in your town. Call the store and ask three or four questions to learn more about the store.
rp_11.description_ko: 새로 개업한 건강식품 파는 상점에 전화 문의

rp_11.english: You read about a professional nutritionist that helps people improve their diet. Call the nutritionist's office and ask three or four questions to get more information.
rp_11.description_ko: 영양사에게 식습관 개선 프로그램에 대해 전화로 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. Your friend has a family member who has just opened up a restaurant. Ask three or four questions to learn more about this new restaurant to decide whether you want to order food from it.
rp_11.description_ko: 친구의 가족분이 새로 오픈 한 음식점에 대해 친구한테 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. A friend has invited you for dinner tomorrow night at a restaurant that you've never been to. Call your friend and leave a voice mail message asking three or four questions about the restaurant.
rp_11.description_ko: 내일 함께 저녁 식사할 음식점에 대해 친구에게 전화 질문

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You would like to go to a new restaurant that has opened recently. Call the restaurant and ask three or four questions to see if you want to go to that restaurant.
rp_11.description_ko: 새로 개업한 음식점에 전화해서 음식점에 대해 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You are trying to find a brand new store that just opened but you are lost. You see a restaurant that is open. Go into the restaurant and ask three or four questions to find out how to get to the store.
rp_11.description_ko: 어떤 상점 찾고 있는데, 못 찾겠음. 근처 음식점에 가서 길안내 요청

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You would like to buy a new mobile phone. Call a store and tell them what you need. And then, ask three or four questions to find out about the phones they offer.
rp_11.description_ko: 전화기 대리점에 신규 휴대전화 구매 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You and your friend are going to be travelling internationally and you want to take your phone with you. Call your phone service provider, explain the situation, and ask two or three questions to learn about what you may need to do to use your phone overseas, what the charges may be, and other relevant information.
rp_11.description_ko: 해외여행 전에 통신사에 전화로 해외 로밍 문의

rp_11.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. Your friend has gotten a new version of the phone that you currently have. You are curious about the new version. Ask your friend two to three questions about the phone and its different features.
rp_11.description_ko: 친구가 본인이 쓰는 휴대폰 기종 신규 모델 구입 함. 친구에게 질문

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. When you tried to visit the site that your friend has recommended, nothing comes up. Call your friend and explain what happened. Then, make some suggestions as to how you might want to see the site as soon as possible.
rp_12.description_ko: 그 사이트가 접속이 안 되어 친구에게 전화 도움 요청

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You have tried to log on to that website, but there is something wrong with your web browser. Call the internet help desk and ask for help. Explain why you need to get help as soon as possible.
rp_12.description_ko: 웹 브라우저 문제 발생. 인터넷 서비스 센터에 전화 도움 요청

rp_12.english: Your friend offers to meet you, so that you can learn more about the industry which she works in. However, a few days before meeting your friend, a member of your family has an emergency and need to help him. Call your friend, explain the situation and offer two or three alternatives, so that you can get the information later on.
rp_12.description_ko: 가족 중 한 사람이 긴급 상황 발생. 기술산업 전문가인 친구를 만날 수 없게 되어, 친구에게 상황 설명. 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. The clothes you have ordered have arrived, but one of the shirts has a problem. Call the clothing store and explain the problem. Give two to three alternatives to solve the problem.
rp_12.description_ko: 배달된 여러 옷 중 셔츠에 문제가 있음. 전화 문제해결

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. The clothes you have ordered arrived at your home, but one of the shirts is NOT the correct one. Call the clothing store and explain the problem. Make two to three suggestions as to how and when you can get the correct shirt.
rp_12.description_ko: 셔츠 하나가 다른 제품이 배달 옴. 전화 문제해결

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. Once you get home with an item you bought, you realize that the item is damaged. Call the store and explain the situation and state what you want to do to resolve the situation.
rp_12.description_ko: 구매한 물품이 손상되어 있음. 상점에 전화로 문제 해결

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. Once you get home with the things you bought, you realize that you did not get them at the sale price. Call the store and explain the situation and offer several ways to resolve the situation.
rp_12.description_ko: 구매한 물건이 세일가격 적용이 안 되어 전화로 문제 해결

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You went to the sale and bought several items, but when you returned home, you are surprised to discover that one item is missing. Call the store and leave a message explaining your problem with as much detail as possible. Suggest several solutions to the situation.
rp_12.description_ko: 구매한 물건 중 하나 상점에 두고 옴. 전화 도움 요청

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You left your wallet behind at the store. Call the store and explain your situation. Give several alternatives to solve the problem.
rp_12.description_ko: 지갑을 상점에 두고 옴. 전화 도움 요청

rp_12.english: A new food store has opened in your neighborhood. You visited that store and purchased some items. However, when you got home, you found out that the clerk left out some items from your food cart. Call the store, explain the situation and make suggestions to solve the problem.
rp_12.description_ko: 구매한 일부 물품을 종업원이 실수로 담아 주지 않음. 식료품점에 전화해서 도움 요청

rp_12.english: I'm sorry but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You have booked a non-refundable plane ticket. However, something has happened that prevents you from going next week. Call the travel agent, explain what has happened, and offer some alternatives to resolve the problem.
rp_12.description_ko: 여행 계획 변경 필요. 여행사 전화해서 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. The travel agent informs you that the vacation you want is not available for the dates you want. Call your friend, leave a message explaining the situation and offer two or three alternatives.
rp_12.description_ko: 친구에게 여행 상품이 원하는 날짜에 없다고 설명. 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. When you have arrived at the airport, you were told that your flight had been cancelled and all other flights were completely booked. Call your travel agency, explain the situation, and make two or three suggestions to deal with the situation.
rp_12.description_ko: 공항 도착했는데 항공편 결항. 여행사에 전화로 문제해결

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. The day before your trip, you realize that you will not be able to go. Call your friend and explain why you cannot visit, and make some suggestions as to when you might visit in the future.
rp_12.description_ko: 문제가 생겨서 여행 못 가게 된 상황. 친구에게 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. Your friend wants you to come over and see his pictures from his trip this evening. However, you have another engagement. Call your friend, explain why you cannot come by this evening and offer some alternatives.
rp_12.description_ko: 친구가 자기 집에 여행 사진 보러 오라고 초대했는데, 다른 약속이 있어서 못 감. 전화해서 상황 설명하고 대안제시

rp_12.english: I am arriving for visiting your country today. You are going to meet me at the airport, but you have some emergency and can not make it. Call my voice mail and leave a message. Explain the problem and give me two or three options so that I can get from the airport to your home.
rp_12.description_ko: 상대가 오늘 공항 도착, 내가 공항 픽업 가기로 했으나 긴급 상황으로 못 감. 전화해서 상황 설명, 대안 제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. Because of the flight delay, you cannot attend a business meeting. Call your client, explain the situation, and offer some alternatives to solve the problem.
rp_12.description_ko: 항공편 지연으로 고객미팅 못 감. 전화로 설명/대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. When you and your friend arrive at the theater, you discover that you have been sold the wrong tickets. Explain the situation to the ticket seller in the booth and offer two or three alternatives to resolve the problem.
rp_12.description_ko: 영화관 현장에서 상대가 잘못 판매한 표 설명, 문제해결

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You are at the movies with your friend, but the movie is boring and you want to leave. Explain the problem to your friend and come up with two to three alternatives.
rp_12.description_ko: 영화관에서 친구와 영화를 보다 너무 지루해서 중간에 나오고 싶음. 친구한테 상황 설명, 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. When you try to play the movie, something is wrong and it does not play. Explain the problem to your guests and offer two or three different solutions or alternatives to the problem.
rp_12.description_ko: 집에서 영화 재생이 안 되어 친구들에게 상황 설명, 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve. When you get your new furniture at your home, you realize that there is a serious problem. Call the store and explain the problem in detail. Then make some suggestions as to how you can resolve the problem as quickly as possible.
rp_12.description_ko: 가구가 도착했는데 심각한 문제 있음. 전화로 문제해결

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve. When you get the piece of furniture at home, you don't like the way it looks. Call the store, explain why you are not satisfied, and propose some solutions to resolve the problem.
rp_12.description_ko: 가구가 도착했는데 외관이 마음에 안 들. 전화로 문제해결

rp_12.english: A person from abroad has recently rented an apartment in your building. It seems that he is not familiar with recycling policies and has been throwing away garbage in the recycling bin. The other residents are upset. Speak to the new person, explain the recycling rules and offer some suggestions to prevent this from happening in the future.
rp_12.description_ko: 해외에서 온 새 입주자가 재활용 수거함에 쓰레기 투척. 주민들 불만. 그 사람에게 가서 재활용 정책 설명

rp_12.english: You often host large parties and take out most of the recycling and garbage the next day. However, other residents in your building are not happy about it, and one of them has come to complain to you. Explain the situation and offer some suggestions to resolve the problem.
rp_12.description_ko: 본인이 파티를 한 후 쓰레기 처리 관련하여 주민들에게 항의 들어옴. 항의 온 주민에게 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. When you arrive at your relative's house, the door is locked and the key is not where it is supposed to be. Call your relative's hotel and leave a message explaining the situation. Give two or three options to resolve the problem.
rp_12.description_ko: 친척집에 도착했는데 문 잠겨 있고, 열쇠를 못 찾겠음. 친척이 머물고 있는 호텔에 전화로 상황 설명하고 도움요청

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. When you get to your new home, you discover that a window is broken. Call the repair shop and leave a message. Describe in detail the condition of the window. Explain how you think the window got broken. Give two or three reasons why it is important that the window is fixed today.
rp_12.description_ko: 입주했는데 창문 깨져 있음. 수리점에 수리 요청

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You borrowed your friend's MP3 player and broke it. Call your friend, explain in detail how the MP3 player broke and the current condition of the MP3 player. Then, offer two or three options to get your friend a working MP3 player as soon as possible.
rp_12.description_ko: 친구의 MP3 플레이어 빌렸다가 고장. 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. On the day of the performance, you are sick. Call your friend and explain the situation and offer two different options for resolving the situation.
rp_12.description_ko: 몸이 아파서 공연에 못 가게 되어 친구에게 상황 설명. 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You want to rent a specific kind of car, but you find out that NONE are available. Call the manager and describe the situation. Explain why you want that particular kind of car and offer several alternatives to solve the problem.
rp_12.description_ko: 본인이 원하는 렌터카 차종이 없어서 전화해서 문제해결

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. I am not sure if I can let you rent a car because I am not familiar with your non-US driver's license. Can you explain to me what the license says and why it is the same as a valid US license?
rp_12.description_ko: 미국 운전면허증이 아닌 본인 면허증에 대해 설명

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. Because of the car trouble, you will miss an important business meeting. Call your client and explain the situation and offer some alternative solutions.
rp_12.description_ko: 차 고장으로 고객 미팅 못 감. 고객에게 전화로 상황 설명. 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You parked the bike that you borrowed outside the shopping mall, but the bike was run over by a truck. Call your friend and explain the situation. Give two or three alternatives to your friend.
rp_12.description_ko: 자전거 쇼핑몰에 주차했는데 트럭에 치여 고장. 친구한테 전화해서 상황 설명 후 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. When you get to the train station, you miss your train and will be late to meet your friend. Call your friend, explain your situation and offer some alternatives.
rp_12.description_ko: 기차를 놓쳐서 친구 만날 약속 늦게 되어 설명, 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. When you get to your hotel room, it is very small and not clean at all. Call the front desk and describe what you have found in detail. Then make some suggestions as to how you can resolve the situation.
rp_12.description_ko: 호텔 객실이 매우 작고 지저분함. 프론트에 전화로 문제해결

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You are supposed to travel outside of your country on a business trip with your boss. But due to a sudden problem, you are unable to go. Call your boss and explain the situation in detail. And then, offer two or three possible solutions, so your company would not lose this business opportunity.
rp_12.description_ko: 직장 상사와 해외출장을 가기로 되어 있는데 못 가게 됨. 상사에게 전화에서 상황설명. 이 사업 기회 잃지 않게 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You've learned that there are no rooms available in this hotel. Call your travel companions to let them know about the situation. Leave a message to describe the situation and propose alternative solutions to the problem.
rp_12.description_ko: 여행 일행들에게 호텔 만실 알리기. 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. When you arrive on your vacation, you realize that you have brought the wrong clothes for the weather. Call a clothing store and explain what happened in detail. And then, make some arrangements to purchase some new clothes as soon as possible.
rp_12.description_ko: (가져온 옷이 날씨에 안 맞아서) 현지 옷가게에 옷 구매 관련 문의

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You have left your bag in the taxi that brought you back to the hotel. Call the taxi company and explain what happened, describe your bag, and tell them how to get the bag back to you.
rp_12.description_ko: 택시에 가방을 두고 내림. 택시회사에 전화/도움 요청

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You just got your bank card, but there is problem and you can't use it. Call the bank, explain the situation, and offer some suggestions to get a new card.
rp_12.description_ko: 카드 받았는데 문제가 있음. 전화해서 문제해결

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You have left your new bank card at the restaurant where you had dinner. Call the restaurant and explain what happened. Describe the card and tell them how to get the card back to you.
rp_12.description_ko: 은행 카드를 음식점에 두고 와서 전화로 도움 요청

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. On the day of your appointment, you realize that you will not be able to make it. Call the doctor's office and explain your situation in detail. Then, offer some suggestions as to when you can reschedule the appointment.
rp_12.description_ko: 사정이 생겨서 병원 진료 예약 전화로 변경

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. Due to an emergency, you will not be able to attend your job interview. Call the company and leave a message explaining the situation. Then, offer two or three alternate plans so that you do not lose this opportunity.
rp_12.description_ko: 면접 못 가는 긴급 상황 설명. 전화로 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You just had a car accident and you think you are going to be late for the holiday party. Call your friend, explain the situation, and give two to three alternatives regarding the situation.
rp_12.description_ko: 차 사고가 나서 파티에 늦게 될 상황 설명, 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. After you agreed to help plan the party with your friend, you realize that you will be very busy the week before the party. Since you have less time to help your friend, call him, explain the situation and offer two or three suggestions on how to plan the party in less time.
rp_12.description_ko: 친구 파티 도와줄 시간이 많지 않음. 전화로 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You are supposed to help your friend prepare for the party. However, you have a problem and cannot go to the party. Call your friend, explain the situation, and give two to three alternatives regarding the situation.
rp_12.description_ko: 친구 생일파티 못 감. 준비 못 도와 줌. 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You already have plans for the evening of the party. Call your friend, explain the situation, and offer two to three alternatives regarding the situation.
rp_12.description_ko: 겹치는 선약이 있어서 파티에 못 가게 되어 친구한테 설명

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. On your way to your friend's house, your car breaks down. You realize you will be very late. Call your friend and explain what happened in detail. Then, make some suggestions and tell them how and when you will get to the holiday meal.
rp_12.description_ko: 친구집에 가는 길에 차 고장. 매우 늦을 거 같음. 대안제시

rp_12.english: On the day of the celebration, a water pipe breaks in your home and you have to stay there until it is repaired. Call your friend, explain what has happened, and propose some alternative plans to see your friend at another time.
rp_12.description_ko: 집 수도관 파열로 참석 불가. 전화로 상황 설명, 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You are unable to meet your friend at the time and place that was agreed upon. Call your friend and give three or four alternatives to address the problem.
rp_12.description_ko: 친구를 만나기로 한 시간/장소에서 못 만나게 됨. 전화로 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. On the day you are supposed to visit your friend, you wake up with a terrible toothache. Call your friend and explain the problem in detail. Then make some arrangements to reschedule your visit to another day.
rp_12.description_ko: 약속 당일 심한 치통으로 친구집에 못 가게 되어 설명, 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You arranged to meet trainers and nutritionists at the gym, but on the morning that you were supposed to meet them, you wake up and feel ill. Call the gym, explain the situation and offer two to three possible alternatives.
rp_12.description_ko: 몸이 아파서 헬스클럽 예약 전화로 불참통보. 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. When you visit the gym for the first time, it is not at all what you expected. Call the gym manager and describe your experience in detail. And then, make an arrangement to get a full refund for your money.
rp_12.description_ko: 헬스클럽 첫 방문 후에 마음에 들지 않아서 전화로 환불 요청

rp_12.english: After purchasing a food item at the store, you have discovered that something is wrong with the item. Call the store and explain the problem in detail and propose a solution.
rp_12.description_ko: 구매한 건강식품에 문제 있어서 전화로 문제해결

rp_12.english: You have an appointment to meet with a nutritionist who can help you make your diet healthier. However, on the day of the meeting, your boss asks you to work late. Call the nutritionist, explain the situation, and offer some alternatives.
rp_12.description_ko: 야근해야 해서 영양사와 예약 전화로 변경 요청, 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You ordered food to be delivered to your workplace for a lunch meeting. When you opened the package, you realize that the delivery person has brought you someone else's order. Call the restaurant, talk to the manager and offer two or three solutions to the problem, so that you can get the correct order as soon as possible.
rp_12.description_ko: 잘못 배달된 점심 도시락 음식점에 전화해서 문제 해결

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. On your way to the restaurant, you were delayed by an accident on the road. Call your friend's cell phone and leave a voice mail. Explain the situation and offer two or three alternatives.
rp_12.description_ko: 저녁 식사자리 가는 길에 사고로 도로 정체. 친구에서 상황설명, 대안제시

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. You just had a great meal at the new restaurant, but after your meal, you found out that you left your money and wallet at home. Explain your situation to the staff and make suggestions to solve the problem.
rp_12.description_ko: 현금과 지갑을 집에 두고 와서 직원에게 외상 요청

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem I need you to resolve. When you get to the store, you realize that you left your wallet at the restaurant. Call the restaurant, explain what happened, and suggest an arrangement for the wallet to be returned to you.
rp_12.description_ko: 상점에 도착하고 보니, 아까 그 음식점에 지갑을 두고 옴. 전화 도움 요청

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. When you get the new phone, you realized that it does not have all the features you need. Call the store, explain what is missing, and make arrangements to get a phone that has what you need.
rp_12.description_ko: 구매한 전화기 기능이 마음에 들지 않음. 교환 요청

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. Before you leave on a trip overseas with the friend, you learn that your phone service plan is set up for international calls, but your friend's phone is not. Talk to your friend and offer two or three solutions to resolve this problem.
rp_12.description_ko: 친구 전화기 국제통화 불가능. 친구한테 해결책 제안

rp_12.english: I'm sorry, but there is a problem which I'll need you to resolve. Your friend tries to send a document to your smartphone. You attempt to open the document, but you cannot read it. Contact your friend, explain the situation, and offer two or three possible solutions to the problem.
rp_12.description_ko: 친구가 휴대폰으로 보낸 파일에 문제가 있음. 상황 설명. 대안제시

unknown.english: Describe something memorable you saw online for work or for leisure. Maybe it was something impressive, unusual, humorous or meaningful for you. What did you notice about it? What made it special?
I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. Your friend has found a cool website. Call your friend and ask three or four questions about the website he/she has found.
unknown.description_ko: 친구가 찾은 웹사이트에 대해 친구에게 전화로 질문

unknown.english: Tell me what recycling was like when you were a child. Was there a particular place to bring the recyclables? Did you have special containers? Describe what it was like and what you did in detail.
unknown.description_ko: 어렸을 때 했던 재활용 방법 묘사 - 인식 변화

unknown.english: What is your normal routine at home? What things do you usually do during the weekdays? What kinds of things do you do on the weekend?
unknown.description_ko: 본인의 집에서 주중/주말 일과 묘사 - 집안일 / 재활용

unknown.english: Describe your favorite restaurant with an ethnic or international menu. Tell me all about the place in as much detail as possible.
unknown.description_ko: 본인이 가장 좋아하는 외국 음식점 묘사 – 햄버거집

unknown.english: Tell me about a memory that you have about a special food or a dish from your childhood. Tell me where and when you had this dish. Describe in detail. What made this experience so memorable?
unknown.description_ko: 어렸을 때 먹었던 특별한 음식 관련 경험 묘사 – 햄버거

unknown.english: Ideas about what good health is and how to maintain it change frequently. What did people think about to maintain good health when you were a child? What was considered to be a healthy diet at that time? How did people usually exercise? Describe how our ideas of what means to be healthy have changed over time.
unknown.description_ko: 건강에 대한 인식과 운동법 과거 현재 비교

unknown.english: Tell me about one particular shopping experience with as much detail as possible. Where you were, what happened, how it happened, what you and/or others did and how all turnd out.
unknown.description_ko: 본인이 겪은 특정 쇼핑 에피소드 묘사 — 품절/교환/환불

unknown.english: How has the weather in your country changed over time? Was the weather typically like when you were a child? How was the weather different from the weather today?
unknown.description_ko: 어렸을 때 날씨와 최근 날씨 비교

unknown.english: Tell me about the last time you got together with your friends or family. Who was there and when was it? Tell me everything you did that day from beginning to end.
unknown.description_ko: 가족/친구와 최근에 했던 일 묘사 – 음식점

unknown.english: Tell me about the kinds of things you typically do when you visit friends or family? Do you eat, talk, or play together? What are some popular activities when you get together?
unknown.description_ko: 가족/친구 집에 가면 주로 하는 일들 묘사 – 수다 (날씨/영화)

unknown.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. Your friend tells you about a great sale happening at one of your favorite stores. Ask your friend three or four questions to find out as much as you can about the sale.
unknown.description_ko: 가장 좋아하는 상점에 세일에 대해 친구에게 전화로 질문

unknown.english: I'd like to give you a situation and ask you to act it out. You want to buy a new piece of furniture for your home. At the store, you see a piece that you like, but you have some questions about it. Pretend you are speaking to a salesperson and ask three or four questions to get all the information you need about the furniture you like.
